# Widget Grammar Reference

## Top-Level Structure

```
[@version(N)]
widget widget-name {
  purpose { ... }
  requires @priority { fields { ... } actions { ... } }
  anatomy { partName: role { description } }
  states {
    stateName [initial] {
      on EVENT -> targetState;
      entry [action]; exit [action];
    }
  }
  accessibility {
    role: application;
    keyboard { Key -> ACTION; }
    focus { trap: true; initial: part; roving: true }
    aria { part -> { aria-attr: value; } }
  }
  affordance { serves: purpose; specificity: N; when: condition; bind { field: source; } }
  props { propName: Type (default: value) }
  connect { partName -> { attr: value; } }
  compose { partName: widget("name", { prop: value }) }
  invariant { "description" }
}
```
